## Q1-002: Hardcoded Database Credentials in DB Initializer

- **Severity**: Medium
- **File**: models/user_model.py
- **Line**: 99-101
- **Type**: Hardcoded Credentials (Default Users)
- **Verdict**: VALID

### Evidence
```python
User.register_user("name1", "pass1", "mail1@mail.com", False)
User.register_user("name2", "pass2", "mail2@mail.com", False)
User.register_user("admin", "pass1", "admin@mail.com", True)
```

Default admin and user credentials are hardcoded. The admin account uses the weak password `pass1`.
